heading: Law governing reports to the President and the Congress
label: 290g–2 Law governing reports to the President and the Congress
text: The provisions of , shall apply with respect to the Fund to the same extent as with respect to the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Monetary Fund.section 286b of this title
notes: Amendments1989— struck out at end “Reports with respect to the Fund under paragraphs (5) and (6) of , shall be included in the first report made thereunder after the United States accepts participation in the Fund.”Pub. L. 101–240section 286b(b) of this title
amendments: Amendments1989— struck out at end “Reports with respect to the Fund under paragraphs (5) and (6) of , shall be included in the first report made thereunder after the United States accepts participation in the Fund.”Pub. L. 101–240section 286b(b) of this title
